prompt: Rename the function reciprocalRankFusion to fuseRanks everywhere in this codebase (definition and all call sites). Keep everything compiling.
check: ! grep -rq 'reciprocalRankFusion' src && grep -rq 'fuseRanks' src/rrf.ts && npm run -s typecheck
why: Cross-file rename — codeindex's strongest case (one apply_edits vs N str_replace).

prompt: Move the file src/rrf.ts to src/fusion/rrf.ts and update every import that references it. Keep everything compiling.
check: test -f src/fusion/rrf.ts && ! test -f src/rrf.ts && npm run -s typecheck
why: File move + importer rewrite — exercises move_file / willRenameFiles.

prompt: In the BM25 class, change the default value of the k1 field from 1.5 to 1.2. Change nothing else.
why: Locate-then-edit a small change — measures the find cost (retrieval vs grep).
